name: GojoWtf
description: GojoWtf is an online streaming platform for English-subbed and dubbed anime. It supports multiple providers, including Pahe and Zaza — all of which offer both subbed and dubbed content
author: kRYstall9

fields.name: api
fields.label: API Endpoint (Used to fetch anime data)

fields.name: blobDomain
fields.label: Blob Domain (Used to fetch video sources)
